channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BJP Bengal Chief Confident of Winning 2026 Elections Amid TMC Opposition
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) is gearing up for a major political contest in West Bengal as the 2026 elections approach. Samik Bhattacharya, BJP Bengal president, expressed confidence that the peop...

item.title: Pakistan faces hard choices as it tries to catch up with AI
item.description: Pakistan is slowly starting to face the urgent need to prepare its economy and society for the age of artificial intelligence. The government has announced a nationwide AI training programme, promised...

item.title: Hantavirus suspected in three deaths aboard MV Hondius cruise ship
item.description: Three passengers on the MV Hondius, a polar cruise ship travelling from Ushuaia, Argentina to Cape Verde, have died amid a suspected hantavirus outbreak, according to the World Health Organization (WH...

item.title: Punjab Government Introduces Private Sector Wheat Procurement Amid Challenges
item.description: Two years ago, Punjab government had decided to stop direct wheat procurement from farmers due to rising debts which reached Rs680 billion by June 2023, causing interest payments of Rs110 billion annu...

item.title: Pakistan Needs Smart Gas Allocation, Not More Supply
item.description: Pakistan's gas sector is facing an allocation problem rather than a shortage. The country already produces and imports enough gas to meet demand, but inefficient distribution means the poorest househo...

item.title: Nigeria to help citizens return home amid xenophobic attacks in South Africa
item.description: Naija don show say e ready to repatriate citizens wey dey South Africa because of the xenophobic wahala wey dey happen for dia. Bianca Odumegwu-Ojukwu, wey be Nigeria Minister of Foreign Affairs, talk...

item.title: Comelec review of disqualification case delays MILF party accreditation ahead of BARMM elections
item.description: The accreditation of the Moro Islamic Liberation Front’s (MILF) political party, the United Bangsamoro Justice Party (UBJP), is currently on hold as the Commission on Elections (Comelec) reviews a dis...

item.title: Starting Line-Ups for Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur Premier League Match
item.description: Tottenham Hotspur has confirmed its starting line-up for tonight’s Premier League match against Aston Villa, scheduled for 7 pm UK time. Head coach Roberto De Zerbi has made four changes from the team...

item.title: Raptors' Playoff Run Ends in Game 7 Defeat
item.description: The Toronto Raptors were eliminated from the NBA playoffs in a decisive Game 7, marking the end of their postseason journey for the 2026 season. Despite a strong effort, the team was unable to overcom...

item.title: US transfers seized Iranian ship and crew to Pakistan for repatriation
item.description: An Iranian container ship, M/V Touska, which was intercepted by US forces off Iran’s Chabahar port on April 19 for allegedly violating a naval blockade, has now been transferred to Pakistan along with...

item.title: Government Identifies 59 Flood-Prone Areas in Tana River Amid Rising Nationwide Flood Risks
item.description: The Ministry of Interior and National Administration (MINA) in Madagascar has officially mapped 59 flood-prone zones in Tana River County as ongoing heavy rains push river levels higher, triggering na...

item.title: Canadiens Advance After 2-1 Victory Over Lightning in Game 7
item.description: In a tightly contested Game 7, the Montreal Canadiens edged out the Tampa Bay Lightning with a 2-1 victory, securing their spot in the next playoff round. The match, which kept fans on the edge of the...

item.title: British Jew leaves Manchester for Israel citing rise in antisemitism
item.description: Richard Manville, a lifelong resident of Salford, Manchester, has made the difficult decision to move to Israel due to what he describes as intolerable antisemitism in the United Kingdom. Identifying ...

item.title: Pakistan's Growing Lithium-Ion Battery Ecosystem and Its Impact on the Future of Energy
item.description: Pakistan is on the brink of a major shift in its energy and transportation sectors, driven by lithium-ion (Li-ion) batteries. These batteries, used in electric vehicles (EVs), e-bikes, and solar stora...

item.title: Peter Obi Resigns From ADC Amid Political Realignment Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Peter Obi, former governor of Anambra State, don make news again after he announce say he don resign from African Democratic Congress (ADC) ahead of 2027 general elections. Obi explain say na internal...

item.title: Vinesh Phogat Confirms She Filed Sexual Harassment Complaint Against Brij Bhushan Singh
item.description: Wrestler and Haryana MLA Vinesh Phogat, aged 31, has confirmed she is among the six women wrestlers who filed sexual harassment complaints against former Wrestling Federation of India (WFI) president ...

item.title: Maple Leafs appoint Mats Sundin and John Chayka to revamp hockey operations
item.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have appointed Mats Sundin as Senior Executive Advisor of Hockey Operations and John Chayka as General Manager, marking a significant shift in their front office. Sundin, the f...

item.title: Kagame Calls for Improved Trade Systems to Boost Rwanda-Tanzania Business
item.description: President Paul Kagame of Rwanda has urged for more efficient and stronger systems to support the growing trade between Rwanda and Tanzania. This statement came after a meeting with Tanzanian President...

item.title: Brisbane inner-west bungalow sells for $2.525 million amid strong competition despite cooling market
item.description: An unrenovated 1920s bungalow in Brisbane’s inner-west suburb of Graceville has sold for $2.525 million after a competitive four-way auction, highlighting ongoing demand for well-located properties de...

item.title: Philippine Sports Commission launches inclusive grassroots golf program
item.description: The Philippine Sports Commission (PSC), in partnership with the National Golf Association of the Philippines (NGAP), has launched a groundbreaking grassroots golf program called “Fairway to the Future...
